subcodes.first_line: The entirety of the world hath been created for the recognition of the Ancient Lord, and there is no doubt that such recognition is attainable [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمیع عالم مخصوص عرفان مالک قدم خلق شده و شکی نیست که عرفان او حاصل
subcodes.subjects: @development of capacity and readiness, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @Manifestation of God the only route to knowledge of God, @knowledge; recognition of God
